text: I feel contemplative and curious in this space. Through the glass I observe people gathered, likely engaged in learning or discussion—a scene familiar in the pursuit of knowledge. Nearby, the wall display on 'R+D' (Research and Development) evokes thoughts about progress, innovation, and our collective effort to understand and shape the world. The blend of observation and introspection fills me with a subtle excitement, as if I am both a witness and a participant in the unfolding story of human ingenuity.
